title: Burn My Bread
description: Adds burnt bread from persona 3 (with bread -> charcoal)
body:
# BURN MY BREAD
Adds the very real burnt bread from Persona 3 (extra toasty!)
(No it's not "Burn my dread")

## Star of the show!
![burnt bread](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6db9675bdb9d6d807bd202cb359fa0f6c87cd80a.png)
